# Design Brief Template

## 1. Overview
- `Title:`
- `Requestor:`
- `Priority:` (P0-P3)
- `Target Release:`

## 2. Problem Definition
- `Background / Context:`
- `Problem Statement:`

## 3. Desired Outcome
- `Goal:`
- `User Impact:`
- `Business Impact:`

## 4. Scope
- `In Scope:`
- `Out of Scope:`

## 5. Experience Definition
- `Primary Flow:`
- `Edge Cases (if applicable):`

## 6. Dependencies
- `Related features / technical dependencies / blocking items:`

## 7. Success Criteria
- `How will we measure improvement?`

## 8. Design Deliverables (Completed by Design)
- `Figma link:`
- `Components updated:`
- `Tokens impacted:`
- `Prototype annotations:`
